Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel San Franciscos Ocme To Produce Decedents Blood And Tissue Samples
Off Calendar Nov-19-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. ROBERT CAROLL III, Esq. of Phillips, Erlewine Given & Carlin LLP (Tel: 415-398-0900) for plaintiffs;
Atty. BARBARA E. KENNEDY, Esq. of Flynn, Delich & Wise LLP (Tel: 562-435-2626) for defendant Pier 39 LP.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT PIER 39 LP's Motion To Compel San Francisco's Office of the Chief Medical Examiner To Produce Decedents Blood And Tissue Samples.

Both sides stipulate to the matter being decided by the Judge Pro Tem. The Judge Pro Tem and counsel for both sides (all appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court rules as follows: Motion granted. The samples are to be given to both sides.

Counsel for Pier 39 LP to prepare and submit a proposed order in Word format to plaintiffs' counsel and to the Judge Pro Tem at Klgallo@discoveryreferee.com. Plaintiffs' counsel may submit a redlined version of the proposed order to the Judge Pro Tem.

Judge Pro Tem: Katherine Gallo; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Nancy Presant, CSR No. 9906, Email: npresantcsr@gmail.com, Tel: 510-757-8550 (302/JPT)

Joinder In Pier 39'S Motion To Compel
Off Calendar Nov-19-2021 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. ROBERT CAROLL III, Esq. of Phillips, Erlewine Given & Carlin LLP (Tel: 415-398-0900) for plaintiffs;
Atty. BARBARA E. KENNEDY, Esq. of Flynn, Delich & Wise LLP (Tel: 562-435-2626) for defendant Pier 39 LP.

HEARIGN RE: DEFENDANT CARTER NICE's Joinder In Pier 39's Motion To Compel.

Both sides stipulate to the matter being decided by the Judge Pro Tem. The Judge Pro Tem and counsel for both sides (all appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Matter not argued/contested. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Joinder is denied as untimely.

Judge Pro Tem: Katherine Gallo; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Nancy Presant, CSR No. 9906, Email: npresantcsr@gmail.com, Tel: 510-757-8550 (302/JPT)
